themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "Now Jonathan and Ahimaaz stayed by En-rogel; for they might not be seen to come into the city...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And I will bring back all the people unto thee: the man whom thou seekest is as if all return...". Cross references echo "Peace".
